anomalies.note: 5.7x surge in link-in-bio clicks. Likely driven by Sendiks availability posts or specific reel pushing 'link in bio' CTA. Identify the trigger post — this is a template to repeat.
Rising frequency. At 3.0+ performance drops begin. Currently 2 weeks away from fatigue zone at current trajectory. Prepare new creative variations now.
CPCs rising as budget scales. Competitor campaign at $0.68 — evaluate if competitor keyword ROAS justifies cost vs NB expansion.
People are watching this 5x on average. With 13 shares but only 265 views, it was likely never promoted. This format/content has viral signal — test with paid promotion.
Curb Your Enthusiasm reference + 246% completion. Comedy/pop culture format is rewatched and shared — worth developing a series.

patterns: ORIGIN + AUTHENTICITY is the dominant win signal across all channels: 'Straight From Wisconsin' ($0.09 CPC, 5.78% CTR), 'Founder story' posts (35-37% ER), founder narrative content — the brand's real story is consistently the highest-performing creative lever available.

TUTORIAL/PRO TIPS content converts across EVERY platform: #1 IG post (35.79% ER), #2 TikTok (Pro Tips), referenced in top FB posts — this format earns attention because it's genuinely useful. The agency should be producing one tutorial-style piece per platform per week.

ASMR + HIGH-COMPLETION VIDEO is YouTube's superpower: ASMR at 118%, Grocery Haul at 127%, Pepperoni at 503%, Pretty Good Pizza at 246% — Viewers are rewatching/looping Real Dough videos at extraordinary rates. This is the brand's most under-leveraged asset.

RELATABLE HUMOR beats product shots on TikTok by 3x: 'Oh you're buying?' (819 views) triples the nearest competitor. New 'Run errands with me' format showing strong engagement density (6.8s avg watch). UGC/lifestyle humor is the TikTok formula.

LIFESTYLE CONTEXT (retailer + day-in-life) is emerging as a new high-performer: Sendiks retailer reels dominating IG reach (1,749, 1,078, 961 reach in top 5). 'Run errands with me' on TikTok. Placing the product in real purchase contexts is working.

META FREQUENCY WARNING — creative refresh window is closing: 2.36 and rising (was 1.89 last analysis). At the current rate of +0.47/period, creative fatigue hits by late April. The 'Straight From Wisconsin' and 'No More Cardboard Crust' creatives are carrying the account — need 2-3 new high-quality variants ready to deploy.

GOOGLE CPC INFLATION on non-branded keywords: 'sourdough pizza crust' ($0.72), 'frozen pizza' ($0.63), 'sourdough frozen pizza' ($0.66) are expensive with modest CTR. Branded terms still hyper-efficient (34.41% CTR for 'real dough pizza'). Shift spend toward branded + long-tail sourdough-specific terms.

INSTAGRAM WEBSITE CLICKS SURGE (5.7x) suggests a direct-to-retail content hook is working — one or more posts drove 788 additional link-in-bio clicks. This is the most important conversion signal in the organic data. Identify the post and systematize it.
HY-VEE EXPANSION showing in data: New Hy-Vee tagged creative is matching Wisconsin efficiency ($0.09 CPC, 5.33% CTR). The Hy-Vee launch is working at the ad level — monitor sell-through data.

COMMENTS ON TIKTOK are rising: 'Okie Dokie Artichokie' (7 comments), 'Run errands with me' (5), suggesting the audience is becoming more engaged. Comment-driving content (unusual flavor names, lifestyle situations) should be prioritized.

YOUTUBE SUBSCRIBER GAP PERSISTS: 10,031 views but only 17 subscribers YTD. Despite extraordinary completion rates, there are zero explicit subscribe CTAs in the analyzed content. This is a gap that could be fixed with a single end-card update across all videos.

TIKTOK STILL EARLY STAGE but data is pointing to the formula: humor > utility > ASMR. Volume is low (28 followers) but engagement quality is solid. Consistent 2x/week posting with the winning formats should compound.

recommendations.action: IDENTIFY THE INSTAGRAM WEBSITE CLICK TRIGGER
recommendations.detail: 956 website clicks vs 168 previously = 5.7x surge. Check IG insights to find which specific post(s) drove this. That post is a template. Replicate the format, the CTA style, and the context immediately.

recommendations.action: URGENT: Prepare new Meta creatives before April 20
recommendations.detail: Frequency at 2.36 and rising. At current trajectory, creative fatigue hits late April. Need 2-3 new high-performing variants ready. Test: Wisconsin origin story in video format, founder team behind-the-scenes, ASMR crust texture close-up (mirror YouTube's top performer). Do NOT pause existing — introduce alongside.

recommendations.action: PROMOTE 'Pepperoni Pizza That Hits Different' on YouTube
recommendations.detail: 503% average view completion + 13 shares but only 265 views = this video never got distribution. Put $200-500 behind it as a YouTube ad test. This is the brand's strongest video signal.

recommendations.action: Add subscribe CTAs to all YouTube videos
recommendations.detail: 10,031 views but only 17 subscribers. Update end cards on all 9 videos to include explicit subscribe prompt. This costs nothing and could 5-10x subscriber conversion rate.

recommendations.action: Shift Google budget: Branded up, Competitor down, NB optimized
recommendations.detail: Branded at $0.19 CPC / 10.41% CTR is the most efficient Google spend but only $277 allocated. Competitor at $0.68 CPC — cut 30% and reallocate to Branded and long-tail sourdough keywords ('sourdough frozen pizza', 'sourdough crust pizza'). Also review 65+ Google targeting — $0.55 CPC doesn't match buyer demo.
$0.09 CPC and 5.78% CTR is running at 43% less cost than the account average. Duplicate this campaign with higher budget cap and monitor if efficiency holds as scale increases.

recommendations.action: Weekly 'Pro Tips' content series across all platforms
recommendations.detail: Pro Tips is the #1 IG post, #2 TikTok, top FB content, and referenced across YouTube. Establish a recurring weekly 'Real Dough Pro Tips' format — each post shares one actionable baking tip. Build 8-12 piece backlog. This is the most scalable content template in the data.

recommendations.action: Develop Pop Culture Comedy series for YouTube + TikTok
recommendations.detail: 'Pretty, Pretty, Pretty Good Pizza' (246% completion, 11 shares) and 'Oh you're buying?' (TikTok #1) confirm the audience responds to recognizable comedy references. Test 3-4 pop culture titled videos (Seinfeld/Office/other) with the same tone. Comedy with pizza = shareable format.

recommendations.action: Build paid amplification test for Founder Story content
recommendations.detail: Founder posts have 35-37% engagement rates but small organic reach (493-503). These posts are loved but not seen. A $500-1,000 Meta boost test targeting 25-54 women in Midwest markets would test whether this content scales to new audience acquisition.

week_summary: Week of March 28 – April 3, 2026 saw strong continued momentum across all paid and organic channels. Total YTD spend hit $7,327 ($5,302 Meta + $2,026 Google). Most significant development: Instagram website clicks surged 5.7x (168 → 956), pointing to a high-converting organic post driving retail discovery. YouTube is generating extraordinary completion rates (ASMR 118%, Grocery Haul 127%, Pepperoni 503%) but subscriber conversion remains near zero — a fixable gap. TikTok is showing early signs of format discovery (humor + lifestyle). Key watch items: Meta frequency rising toward creative fatigue zone and Google CPC inflation on non-branded terms. Priority actions this week: identify the IG website click trigger, prep fresh Meta creatives, promote the YouTube hidden gem, and add YouTube subscribe CTAs.
